title: Scam Detection Result (Fraud Shield -> Command Centre)
description: Output emitted by the Fraud Shield NLP classifier (Sudarsan) for a single call/message analysed. The command centre consumes this to render the scam alert card and feed the fusion LLM.

event_id.description: Unique id for this analysed message/call.

risk_score.description: Probability that this is a scam. 0 = safe, 1 = certain scam.

scam_type.description: Fine-grained scam category when verdict != legit.

markers.description: Digital-arrest / scam markers detected. Powers the 'why flagged' explanation.

explanation.description: Optional plain-language reason (stretch: LLM-generated) shown in the UI.

phone_number.description: Originating number if available (for graph/geo correlation).

reported_payment.description: Optional: what the victim reports having paid. Lets fusion trace the payment into fraud-graph collector accounts (the scam -> mule-ring money trail).

method.description: How the victim paid, if known.

location_hint.description: Optional origin location for the crime map.

verification.description: Agentic verification of concrete entities in a flagged message (links resolved, IFSC/UPI/phone checked). Additive evidence — NEVER changes verdict/risk_score. Null when verdict is legit or verification is disabled.

checked.description: One entry per entity a tool inspected.

any_live.description: Whether any tool made a live network call (vs offline heuristics).
